chunks.text: Sawyer Motors Closed Loop Control of Linear Stepper Motors Goal: Allow force control of linear stepper motors by using position feedback. Papers Optical Position Sensing for Closed-Loop Control of Linear Stepper Motors, E. Nicolson, S. Burgett, A. Wa

ear Stepper Motors, E. Nicolson, S. Burgett, A. Wallack, and B. Yekutiely, In Proceedings, JSME International Conference on Advanced Mechatronics, Tokyo, Japan, pp 322-327, August 1993. Ed Nicolson's home page Last update: 13 May 1994
